children.name: Why a wealth tax doesn’t work | To the Point
opening position
children.summary: Speaker argues wealth taxes are a poor idea, citing OECD abandonment, low revenue, valuation difficulties, and capital/person flight.

children.name: post_hoc
children.evidence: Lots of OECD countries had wealth taxes in the 1990s. More or less all of them have abolished them for precisely that reason.
